info.title: Företagsinformation
info.description: With this API you can retrieve company information. The API use POST for all endpoints instead of GET because we don't want to display identification number (which can be considered sensitive personal data) in the URL.

tags.name: organisationsinformation
tags.description: API to retrieve data about companies, persons, signatory power and cases.

tags.name: ping
tags.description: API to control the status of the service

post.description: With this operation you can retrieve data about a company.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Client generated ID to call the API. In case of error this will be sent in the attribute `requestId` or as a header attribute.

requestBody.description: An object to specify `identitetsbeteckning` (company registration number) and if needed `namnskyddslopnummer` (used to separate companies for organisation types that can have more than one company on the same company registration number) and fields to specify the information objects you want in the answer. Possible information objects are `ORGANISATIONSADRESSER` (postal address and email address), `FIRMATECKNING` (signatory power), `FUNKTIONARER` (company officers), `HEMVISTKOMMUN` (domicile for the company),  `RAKENSKAPSAR` (financial year), `ORGANISATIONSDATUM` (different dates regarding the company), `VERKSAMHETSBESKRIVNING` (description of the business activities), `AKTIEINFORMATION` (information about stocks in the company), `SAMTLIGA_ORGANISATIONSNAMN` (all business names including business names in translation and secondary business names), `ORGANISATIONSENGAGEMANG` (showing a company's assignments in other companies, `TILLSTAND` (showing a company's permits), `OVRIG_ORGANISATIONSINFORMATION` (other organisation information), `ORGANISATIONSMARKERINGAR` (markings on the company), `BESTAMMELSER` (regulations for the company), `VAKANSER_OCH_UPPLYSNINGAR` (vacancies and other information about the company), `EKONOMISK_PLAN` (financial plan for the company form BRF), `UTLANDSK_FILIALAGANDE_ORGANISATION` (information about a foreign company having a Swedish branch), `FINANSIELLA_RAPPORTER` (information about a company's financial reports), and an optional timestamp ('tidpunkt') to retrieve historical information about the company, `DETALJERAD_STATUS` (Detailed status of a company), `UTLANDSKA_FILIALER` (Foreign branches of a company)

post.description: With this operation you can retrieve data about a person.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Client generated ID to call the API. In case of error this will be sent in the attribute `requestId` or as a header attribute.

requestBody.description: An object to specify `identitetsbeteckning` (personal identity number) and fields to specify the information objects you want in the answer. Possible information objects are `ORGANISATIONSENGAGEMANG` (Showing a person’s assignments in companies), `PERSONLIG_KONKURS` (personal bankruptcy), `BITRADESFORBUD` (prohibition of financial assistance), `NARINGSFORBUD` (trade ban (prohibition to carry on business)).

post.summary: Retrieve signatory options for a company officer in a company
post.description: This operation retrieves the alternatives on signatory power for a company officer in combination with a company.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Client generated ID to call the API. In case of error this will be sent in the error message.

requestBody.description: Identity of a company officer and of a company. A company officer can be a legal entity or a physical person.

200.description: Reply with requested alternatives on signatory power.

post.summary: Retrieve data about a case or all cases of a company
post.description: This operation retrieves either data about a specific case or all cases of a company depending on how the request is designed. In the latter option, it is also possible to specify a time interval to limit the response.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Client generated ID to call the API. In case of error this will be sent in the error message.

requestBody.description: An object to specify `ärendenummer` (case number) or `identitetsbeteckning` (company registration number). In the latter option optionally together with a time interval consisting of from- and/or to dates (`fromdatum` and `tomdatum`).

200.description: Reply with requested case data or all cases (with or without a specific time interval) of a requested company.

post.summary: Retrieve data about changes in share capital that has occurred in a company
post.description: This operation retrieves data about historical changes of share capital in a company. It is also possible to specify a time interval to limit the response.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Client generated ID to call the API. In case of error this will be sent in the error message.

requestBody.description: An object to specify `identitetsbeteckning` (company registration number). Optionally together with a time interval consisting of from- and/or to dates (`fromdatum` and `tomdatum`).

200.description: Reply with requested changes of share capital (with or without a specific time interval) of a requested company.

post.summary: Retrieve data about an individual’s or a company’s assignments in other companies.
post.description: This operation retrieves data about an individual’s or a company’s assignments in other companies.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Client generated ID to call the API. In case of error this will be sent in the error message.

requestBody.description: An object to specify `identitetsbeteckning` (company registration number or personal identity number). Optionally together with pagination, filter and sort parameters.

200.description: Reply with the individual’s or a company’s assignments in other companies.

post.summary: Retrieve data about a company’s financial reports.
post.description: This operation retrieves data about an company’s financial reports.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Client generated ID to call the API. In case of error this will be sent in the error message.

requestBody.description: An object to specify `identitetsbeteckning` (company registration number or personal identity number).

200.description: Reply with the company’s financial reports.

post.description: With this operation you can retrieve data about business mortgages.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Client generated ID to call the API. In case of error this will be sent in the attribute `requestId` or as a header attribute.

requestBody.description: An object that allows you to specify one of the following parameters `identitetsbeteckning` (company registration number), `inteckningsnummer` (business mortgage number) or `inteckningsid` (business mortgage identity) to retrieve information about business mortgages.

200.description: Reply with business mortgages for the specified search criteria.

get.description: With this operation you can check to see that the API is up and running.

OrganisationRequest.title: OrganisationRequest

namnskyddslopnummer.description: "Namnskyddslopnummer" is used to separate companies for organisation types that can have more than one company on the same "identitetsbeteckning" (company registration number). For example Enskild näringsverksamhet can have more than one company with different names on the same company registration number. If this parameter is left out the API will reply with all companies on that company registration number. Namnskyddslopnummer may also be padded with leading zeroes, for example "1" may be padded as "001". Note that namnskyddslopnummer can only be used in combination with identitetsbeteckning.

arendenummer.description: Case number of the company. This can be used instead of "tidpunkt" to retrieve data of a company at the moment the case was registered.

organisationInformationsmangd.description: The information objects wanted in the answer. If this is left out the response will just include "identitetsbeteckning", "namnskyddslopnummer", "organisationsnamn", "organisationsform" and "organisationsstatusar". ORGANISATIONSENGAGEMANG can not be combined with request properties "tidpunkt" or "arendenummer" and FINANSIELLA_RAPPORTER can not be combined with request property "arendenummer".

tidpunkt.description: Timestamp for historical data of the retrieved companies. For example "2025-02-25T12:00:00". Note that you can not search on parts of a second. If an errand is registered 2025-02-25T12:00:00.1234, search with 2025-02-25T12:00:01 (+ 1 second) to get the registrated data.

OrganisationRequest.description: Object to retrieve data about a company. Request must contain one of "identitetsbeteckning" or "arendenummer".

OrganisationResponse.title: OrganisationResponse
OrganisationResponse.description: The companies returned in the response. For some company types such as Enskild näringsverksamhet, there may be more than one company returned in the response.

namnskyddslopnummer.description: "Namnskyddslopnummer" is used to separate companies for organisation types that can have more than one company on the same "identitetsbeteckning" (company registration number). For example Enskild näringsverksamhet can have more than one company with different names on the same company registration number.

organisationsstatusar.description: Code, text and type for the Company status and the registration date for the status. If typ is 'AvregistreradOrganisationstyp' the company is no longer active.  If typ is 'AvvecklingsOmstruktureringsforfarande' the company is in a process of status change.

hemvistkommun.title: hemvistkommun

verksamhetsbeskrivning.description: Description of the business activities. Can be a lot of text in some cases.

godkannandeKravs.description: Markings if the articles of association must be approved by for example Swedish Financial Supervisory Authority.

stammotidManader.description: Months for shareholders' or members' meeting. For example JAN, FEB for January and February.

stammotidSenastManad.description: Latest month for shareholders' or members' meeting.

stammotidInomSexManader.description: Marking that the shareholders' or members' meeting will be held within six months after the end of the financial year.

fritext.description: Free text information about the regulations of the organisation

vakanserOchUpplysningar.description: Vacancies and other information about the organisation.

FirmateckningsalternativResponse.title: FirmateckningsalternativResponse

firmateckningInformation.description: The company or companies returned in the response. For some company types such as Enskild näringsverksamhet, there may be more than one company returned in the response.

FirmateckningsalternativResponse.description: Information about the the company officer, the company and information if the company officer has signatory power is in `firmateckningInformation`.

namnskyddslopnummer.description: "Namnskyddslopnummer" is used to separate companies for organisation types that can have more than one company on the same "identitetsbeteckning" (company registration number). For example Enskild näringsverksamhet can have more than one company with different names on the same company registration number.

organisationsstatusar.description: Company status in code and text and the date for the registration of the status.

antal.description: Number of pending registration matters on the company.

inneliggandeArenden.description: Information about pending registration matters on the company.

Firmateckningssvar.title: Firmateckningssvar

utfall.description:
* `JA`: The company officer has signatory power.
  * Observe that there can be unresolved registration errands on the company that can be about to change the rules on who is having signatory power.
* `NEJ`: The company officer does NOT have signatory power. The reason is one of the below:
  * The company does not exist or is deregistered.
  * The company officer has no role in this company.
  * The company officer has a role in this company but the company officer has no signatory power.

firmateckningsutfallJaSvar.description: If the answer is `JA` you get a list of all possible alternatives the company officer has regarding signatory power. Every alternative is a valid option for signatory power. The rule for signatory power for the different options is also shown in `FirmateckningsutfallOrsak`.

alternativ.description:
* `EJ_AKTIV_ORGANISATION`: The company does not exist or is deregistered.
* `EJ_FUNKTIONAR`: The company officer has no role in this company.
* `EJ_FIRMATECKNARE`: The company officer has a role in this company but the company officer does not have signatory power.

firmateckningsutfallNejSvar.description: If the answer is `NEJ` you get the reason for that answer.

Firmateckningssvar.description: Answer if the company officer has signatory power, `JA` (Yes) or `NEJ` (No). If the answer is `JA` you get a list under `firmateckningsutfallJaLista` if the company officer has signatory power `ENSAM` (alone), `LOPANDE` (The managing director can sign on behalf of the company in the course of normal business activities) or `TILLSAMMANS` (together with other company officers). If the answer is `TILLSAMMANS` you get a list of other company officers that the inquired company officer has to sign with. If the answer is `FULLMAKT`, the company officer has signatory power with a power of attorney. Bolagsverket has not the power of attorney registered.

FirmateckningsutfallJa.title: FirmateckningsutfallJa

alternativ.description:
* `ENSAM`: The company officer has signatory power alone
* `LOPANDE`: The managing director is entitled to sign on behalf of the company in the course of normal business activities.
* `TILLSAMMANS`: The company officer has signatory power together with other company officers listed below.
* `FULLMAKT`: The company officer has signatory power with a power of attorney. Bolagsverket has not the power of attorney registered.

namnKanEjListas.description: If the answer is `TILLSAMMANS` but the company officers that needs to be listed cannot be listed because the API does not support that rule for signatory power, it is shown here.

firmateckningsutfallJatillsammansAlterna.title: firmateckningsutfallJatillsammansAlternativ
firmateckningsutfallJatillsammansAlterna.description: The different combination of names that can give this `TILLSAMMANS` answer.

items.description: One or more company officers that is included in the signatory options if the alternative is `TILLSAMMANS`. All company officers listed here must sign in order for the signature to be correct.

FirmateckningsutfallJa.description: If the answer in "alternativ" is `ENSAM` the company officer has signatory power alone. If the answer is `TILLSAMMANS` the company officer has signatory power together with other company officers. If the company officer has the role managing director the answer can be `LOPANDE` which means that the VD can sign on behalf of the company in the course of normal business activities. If the answer is `FULLMAKT`, the company officer has signatory power with a power of attorney. Bolagsverket has not the power of attorney registered.

firmateckningskombination.description: The signatory power can consist of more than one rule for signatory power. The rules for signatory power shall be read in the order they appear.

RequestArendenummer.description: The `Arendenummer` (case number). Consists of an `ärendelöpnummer` and an `ärendeår`, separated by a slash `/`. `ärendeår` will always be with century (four digits). Example, 2024.

fromdatum.description: Limit the request for cases that have started or completed from, and after, this date.

tomdatum.description: Limit the request for cases that have started or completed to, and before, this date.

RequestOrganisationIdentitetsbeteckning.description: The `OrganisationIdentitetsbeteckning` (company registration number). It is also possible to specify a time interval (`from` and/or `tom`).

ArendeResponse.title: ArendeResponse
ArendeResponse.description: Information about the case or all cases of a company is in `arendeInformation`.

ankommetDatum.description: The date when the document that led to the creation of this case was received by Bolagsverket. This date may, in some circumstances, differ from the date the case itself was created.

skapatTidpunkt.description: Time when the case was created.

avslutatTidpunkt.description: Time when the case was completed.

korrigeratDatum.description: The date that the case was corrected.

atagandeid.description: Atagandeid is a technical id used to keep several case numbers at Bolagsverket toghether. For example registration of a new company and registration of benificial owner done at the same time.

konsumentreferens.description: Consumer reference, used as a case id to keep a case together when more than one authority is involved and each authority have different case numbers. Example, registration of a new company from Verksamt.se

inskicksidentitet.description: Inskicksidentitet is a technical id used to reference one or more documents submitted to Bolagsverket.

uppladdningsid.description: Uppladdningsid is a technical id used to reference an annual report that has been submitted to Bolagsverket via the part of the e-service called `Eget utrymme`.

samladInskicksidentitet.description: SamladInskicksidentitet is a technical id used to reference multiple cases created within the same API call. For example the creation of so called `Lagerbolag`.

aktid.description: Aktid is a technical id used to reference one or more documents submitted to Bolagsverket. Multiple values can be provided, separated by a semicolon.

arendeaktorer.description: The one to whom the case applies. Right now there is always one arendeaktor but in future versions there can be more than one arendeaktor.

sakfragor.description: Sakfraga is holding information about what the case is about.

ocrNummer.description: Unique reference number for the case.

ArendeType.description: The case or cases of a company returned in the response. If the request is on `organisationIdentitetsbeteckning`, there may be more than one cases returned in the response. Arendeslag is holding information about if a case is "Verkställighetsärende" (all cases that is being appeal against or reconcidered) and "Grundärende" (all other cases). Arendetyp is holding information about type of case. Example, Registration of a new company. Arendestatus is holding information about if a case is open or closed. Handläggningsstatus is holding information about the case administration status. Example, Waiting for additional information. Arendesamband, Case connection. Used if a case proceeds or continues in other cases. Arendesambandstyp is holding information about the type of connection.

Arendeaktorer.title: Arendeaktorer
Arendeaktorer.description: The one to whom the case applies. Arenderoll is holding information about the role the one to whom the case applies have.

Arendesamband.title: Arendesamband
Arendesamband.description: Case connection. Used if a case proceeds or continues in other cases. Arendesambandstyp is holding information about the type of connection.

OrganisationArende.title: Arende

arendenummer.description: Case number of the company's last completed case. This is the case number when the dataset in this response was updated.

avslutatTidpunkt.description: The timestamp when the company's last case was completed. This is the timestamp when the dataset in this response was updated.

OrganisationArende.description: OrganisationArende is holding information about the company's last completed case, such as case number and timestamp when the case was completed.

Sakfragor.title: Sakfragor
Sakfragor.description: Sakfraga is holding information about what the case is about. Example, change of business name. Avslutsorsak is the reason why the case is closed

fromdatum.description: Limit the request for changes in share capital that have occurred from, and after, this date.

tomdatum.description: Limit the request for changes in share capital that have occurred to, and before, this date.

AktiekapitalforandringRequest.description:
The `identitetsbeteckning` (company registration number). Share capital changes is only available for limited liability companies.

It is also possible to specify a time interval (`fromdatum` and/or `tomdatum`).

organisationsstatusar.description: Code, text and type for the Company status and the registration date for the status. If typ is 'AvregistreradOrganisationstyp' the company is no longer active.  If typ is 'AvvecklingsOmstruktureringsforfarande' the company is in a process of status change.

aktiekapitalforandringar.description: List of historical changes in share capital for the company.

bemyndiganden.description: List of historical changes in authorisations for the company.

skuldebrev.description: List of historical changes in debt instruments for the company.

AktiekapitalforandringType.description: The changes of share capital in a company returned in the response.

Aktiekapitalforandringsinformation.title: Aktiekapitalforandringsinformation
Aktiekapitalforandringsinformation.description: Aktiekapitalforandringsinformation is holding information about a historical change in share capital. Aktieinformation contains information about share capital for the company after the change.

Bemyndigandeinformation.title: Bemyndigandeinformation
Bemyndigandeinformation.description: Bemyndigandeinformation is holding information about a historical change in authorisations.

Skuldebrevsinformation.title: Skuldebrevsinformation
Skuldebrevsinformation.description: Skuldebrevsinformation is holding information about a historical change in debt instruments.

lagst.description: Minimum capital of something, for example shares.

hogst.description: Maximum capital of something, for example shares.

skuldebrevUtgivetIArendenummer.description: Debt instrument published in case number.

lagst.description: Minimum capital of something, for example shares.

hogst.description: Maximum capital of something, for example shares.

aktiekapitalKanOkasMedBelopp.description: Share capital can be increased by amount.

utanLan.description: Subscription option made without a loan.

medLan.description: Subscription option made with a loan.

OrganisationsengagemangRequest.title: OrganisationsengagemangRequest

sida.description: The page of the total hits you want to recieve in the response. For example, page 0 returns the first page of the total hits.

antalPerSida.description: How many hits you want per returned page.

paginering.description: Values for pagination of the response. Default values are 0 for sida and 1000 for antalPerSida.

attribut.description: The attribute to sort by. Organisationsform is legal form for the organisation and registreringstidpunkt is time of registration for company's last case in our register.

sorteringsordning.description: The order in which you want to sort the response. ASC - ascending order, from smallest to largest. DESC - descending order, from largest to smallest.

sortering.description: Values for sorting of the response. If no values are given sorting is done descending by time of registration for company's last case in our register.

filtrering.description: List of objects that allows the reply to be filtered.

OrganisationsengagemangRequest.description: Object data about an individual’s or a company’s assignments in other companies.

Filter.title: Filter

attribut.description: The attribute used as the basis for filtering.

Filter.description: An object that allows the reply to be filtered.

totaltAntalTraffar.description: Number of total hits for the request.

sida.description: Returned page of total hits for the response.

antalPerSida.description: Number of hits per page in the response

FunktionarsOrganisationsengagemang.title: FunktionarsOrganisationsengagemang
FunktionarsOrganisationsengagemang.description: Companies in which the person or company is a company officer.

organisation.title: organisation

namnskyddslopnummer.description: "Namnskyddslopnummer" is used to separate companies for organisation types that can have more than one company on the same "identitetsbeteckning" (company registration number). For example Enskild näringsverksamhet can have more than one company with different names on the same company registration number.

organisation.description: Company in which the person or the company is a company officer.

funktionarsroller.description: The roles the company officer has in the company. Code and text.

anteckning.description: Notations done for the company officer.

FinansiellaRapporterRequest.title: FinansiellaRapporterRequest

identitetsbeteckning.description: The `identitetsbeteckning` (company registration number or personal identity number).

fromdatum.description: Limit the request for financial reports that have been registered from, and after, this date.

tomdatum.description: Limit the request for financial reports that have been registered to, and before, this date.

FinansiellaRapporterRequest.description: Object data about an company’s financial reports.

identitetsbeteckning.description: The `identitetsbeteckning` (company registration number or personal identity number).

arendenummer.description: Case number for the submitted financial report.

avslutatTidpunkt.description: Time when the case was completed.

start.description: Start date for the accounting period.

slut.description: End date for the accounting period.

Rakenskapsperiod.description: Accounting period for the financial report.

Arsredovisning.title: Arsredovisning
Arsredovisning.description: Annual report. The period for the financial report, type of report, arrival date, registration date, information if the financial report is including sustainability report, consolidated accounts or dividend, deficiencies and date when the processing is complete.

Arsredovisningspaminnelse.title: Arsredovisningspaminnelse
Arsredovisningspaminnelse.description: Reminder to submit annual report. Date for reminder and type of reminder.

stammodatum.description: Date for resumed shareholders' or members' meeting.

fritext.description: Free text information about the resumed shareholders' or members' meeting.

periodFrom.description: The period for the financial report applies from this date.

periodTom.description: The period for the financial report applies to this date.

inteckningsid.description: A unique identifier that identifies a business mortgage.

foretagsinteckningar.description: Response with information about business mortgages.

idNaringsidkarkombination.description: ID of the economic operator(s) holding the business mortgage.

naringsidkare.description: Information about the economic operator(s) holding the business mortgage.

anmarkningarNaringsidkare.description: Container for information about remarks on the registration.

upplagg.description: Business mortgage registrations. An registration may contain several business mortgages.

organisationsnamn.description: Name of the economic operator if it is a legal entity.

IdentitetNaringsidkare.description: Information about the identity of the economic operator.

verksamhetsbegransning.description: Description of the operational restriction associated with the registration.
verksamhetsbegransning.example: INDUSTRIELL RÖRELSE VID KRAFTSTATION FÖR FRAMSTÄLLNING AV ELEKTRISK ENERGI

geografiskBegransning.description: Description of the geographical restriction associated with the registration.

inteckningar.description: Container for information about business mortgages.

anteckningarPaUpplagget.description: Container for information about notes associated with the registration.

anmarkningarPaUpplaggetsVerksamhet.description: Container for information about remarks related to the registration’s operations.

dagboksnummer.description: Diary number for the note associated with the registration.

anmarkningar.description: Container for information about remarks associated with the note on the registration.

dagboksnummer.description: Diary number for the remark on the note associated with the registration.

fritext.description: The remark on the note associated with the registration.

dagboksnummer.description: Diary number for the remark related to the business mortgage.

ursprungligtBeslutDagboksnummer.description: The original diary number of the mortgage to which the remark applies.

fritext.description: Note associated with the business mortgage.

inteckningsanmarkningar.description: Container for information about remarks related to the business mortgage.

skriftligtInteckningsbrev.description: Information on whether the business mortgage deed is on paper or in electronic form.

likaRattSomOrdningsnummer.description: Information on whether the business mortgage has equal priority with the business mortgage of the given order number.

beviljad.description: Information on whether the mortgage is granted or not granted.

ordningsnummer.description: Information about the priority order of the business mortgage.

innehavare.description: Container for information about the economic operator of the business mortgage.

sparrPgaForkommenHandling.description: Information on whether the mortgage is subject to a restriction.

dagboksnummer.description: Diary number for the economic operator’s registration note.

postort.description: The economic operator’s city or town.

summaBeviljade.description: Container for the total sum of granted mortgages.

summaEjBeviljade.description: Container for the total sum of non-granted mortgages.

instance.description:
A certain value on `instance` is a unique type of error but also associated with a `type`, that is one value on `instance` shall only occur with a value on `type`.

**General**: `about:blank`
- `not.found` information not found
- `server.error` internal server error

**Access control**: `urn:bolagsverket:error:auth`
- `auth.error` authentication error

**Validation**: `urn:bolagsverket:error:validation`
- `validation.client` validation error of client request

**Network**: `urn:bolagsverket:error:network`
- `network.timeout` network timeout
- `network.error` internal network error

timestamp.description: Date and time in ISO 8601 format.

requestId.description: Identity associated with the API call, sent in header X-Request-Id.

detail.example: Identitetsbeteckning måste vara 10 eller 12 siffror: A7696151111

code.description: The error as a pre-defined code. A possible use case of this field, is for different logic in the client.

source.description: Name of the parameter causing the error.

MissingData.description: Personal data or company data is missing.

not-found.summary: Information on identity number is not available in this API.

value.title: Fel format
value.detail: Identitetsbeteckning måste vara 10 eller 12 siffror: A7696151111
